Headline: Kimball-bound Brown Line Service Delayed near Belmont
ShortDescription: Kimball-bound Brown Line trains are standing near Belmont due to a sick customer. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Kimball-bound Brown Line trains are standing near Belmont due to a sick customer. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
